title: March 2025 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: March 18, 2025 SUMMARY Good afternoon! With this month’s board meeting pushed later because of spring break, I trust you all had a wonderful and refreshing month. It has been another busy month with auditors on-site, ongoing preparations for the HEA Annual Meeting and Board Election; and participation in key industry events, including the Northwest Public Power Association (NWPPA) Board of Trustees meeting in Vancouver, Washington; a Cooperative Finance Corporation Board Meeting (CFC); and the National Rural Electric Cooperative Association (NRECA) PowerXchange 2025 Annual Meeting in Atlanta. Below is a summary of HEA’s recent business activities and progress toward our strategic goals. SAFETY There were no Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) recordable incidents in the month of February! FINANCIAL OVERVIEW Financial Update – Revenue for January came in just un...

title: AST Warrant Arrest & MICS: Wasilla [AK25027919]
summary: On 03/26/25 at 1526 hrs, the Alaska State Troopers conducted a routine traffic stop for a moving violation on Pittman Rd in Wasilla. Investigation revealed that the driver, Joshua Harrison, age 42 of Wasilla, had an outstanding warrant for his arrest for drug possession. A subsequent search of his person revealed that Joshua was in possession of a distributable quantity of a controlled substance. Joshua was arrested for MICS II and MICS V and on his warrant. He was transported to Mat-Su Pre-Trial, where he was held without bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Fox [AK25025986]
summary: On 3/26/25, at 1450 hours, Troopers from the Fairbanks Rural Unit and a Tok based VPSO contacted Benjamin Mulberger age 42 of Fox. Mulberger was arrested on an arrested warrant 4TO-22 -33CR. The warrant was $100.00 dollars unsecure warrant for FTA. Mulberger was arrested without incident and transported to FCC.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Palmer [AK25024631]
summary: On 03/26/25, Court Services Officers assigned to Palmer Judicial Services arrested Jeffery Kyle Wallace, age 35 from Wasilla. Wallace had an active bench warrant resulting from a petition to revoke his probation on the original charge of Misconduct Involving a Controlled Substance in the Fourt Degree. Wallace was remanded to Mat Su Pretrial with bail set at $1000 cash performance and court approved conditions of release.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST EMPLOY UNLICENSED COMMERCIAL CREWMEMBER & COMMERCIAL FISHING CREWMEMBER LICENSE REQUIRED: DUTCH HARBOR [AK25027468]
incident_type: EMPLOY UNLICENSED COMMERCIAL CREWMEMBER & COMMERCIAL FISHING CREWMEMBER LICENSE REQUIRED
summary: On March 25, 2025, Victor Gerard Juliano, 56 years old from Marina, California was cited by the Alaska Wildlife Troopers aboard the Patrol Vessel Stimson for Employ an Unlicensed Commercial Crewmember; Jose Juson, 57 years old from Shoreline, Washington was cited for Commercial Fishing Crewmember License Required in Dutch Harbor. Bail is set at $250 in Unalaska District Court for both offenses.

title: AST DUI: Wasilla [AK25027595]
summary: On 03/25/25 at approximately 2020 hours, AST received a REDDI report of an intoxicated driver operating a vehicle on KGB Road. AST located the vehicle at the Settlers Bay gas station and contacted the driver, Corey Dahlberg. Through investigation, it was determined that Corey had been operating a vehicle while under the influence of alcohol. He was arrested for DUI and transported to Mat-Su pre-trial, where he was remanded and held on $500 bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST DV Assault 4, Criminal Mischief 4: Wasilla [AK25027633]
summary: On 03/26/2025, at approximately 0038 hours, AST responded to a disturbance near Bromley Drive. Through investigation, it was determined that Sean Wiles had caused physical injury and damaged the property of a household member. He was placed under arrest for DV Assault 4 and Criminal Mischief 4. Sean was transported to Mat-Su pre-trial, remanded, and held without bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST DUI / MIW4: North Pole [AK25027657]
summary: On March 26, 2025, at approximately 0214 hours, AST responded to the area of Old Badger Rd in North Pole for a vehicle collision report. Investigation revealed that Steven Judd was Driving While Under the Influence and had a firearm in his vehicle. Following Datamaster processing, Steven was transported to FCC for Driving While Under the Influence and Misconduct Involving Weapons in the Fourth Degree.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
